payload.prompt:
Project: case-003-bag-commuter-variant
Target market: US
Target language: en-US
Project notes: Bag regression variant: same product category, different market angle and copy, focused on commute and daily organization.
Sequence plan: Sequence 1 - hook - Position the handbag as a stylish daily carry bag for commute, errands, and travel.
Primary visual subject: Everyday commuter handbag demo
Create a 9:16 TikTok ecommerce video segment for an everyday commuter handbag. Preserve the pacing of a viral bag product demo: quick opening hook, hand-held product reveal, interior capacity shot, strap/detail close-up, and a final lifestyle carry moment. Use warm daylight, neutral wardrobe styling, realistic leather texture, organized compartments, no captions, no watermark, no fake logos.
Visual constraints: {'style': 'premium_ecommerce_bag_demo', 'camera': 'smooth handheld push-in, detail close-ups, elegant product handling', 'platform': 'tiktok_9_16', 'background': 'clean boutique / neutral lifestyle setting'}
payload.negative_prompt: blurry, warped bag shape, broken zipper, extra straps, fake logos, watermark, captions, text overlay, low quality, distorted hands
